---
title: "Abhi Jain"
image: "abhi.jpg"
links:
  - label: Github
    href: "https://github.com/abhithetree"
  - label: Twitter
    href: "https://twitter.com/abhithetree"
  - label: Email
    url: "mailto:abhithetree@gmail.com"
output:
  postcards::trestles
---
 
I am an incoming Biostatistics PhD student at Boston University via Wake Forest University and Davidson College. My research interests include causal inference and spatiotemporal modeling.
